subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast sacrificed thy spirit, thy body, thy soul and thy very being in the path of God! Upon thee be the glory and praise of God, inasmuch as [3.5s]... ...The darkness of error that has enveloped the East and the West is, in this most great cycle, battling with the light of Divine Guidance
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من فدیت روحک و جسمک و نفسک و ذاتک فی سبیل الله علیک بهاء الله و ثنائه بما
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Mary Magdalene, @apostles; early disciples of Christ, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
